Tejendra Patel

Tejendra is an Associate Director of AI & Software Engineer at Kyndryl, dedicated to building end-to-end AI-driven applications.

Previously, Tejendra has worked as a UX Designer, Full Stack Engineer, and Engineering Manager for companies such as Akamai, Westrock, and Raft. View his full experience.

You can connect with him on LinkedIn or GitHub.

Tejendra uses this site to express and challenge the ideas and thoughts that come to his mind. The views expressed are his own and do not represent his current or past employers or any affiliated organizations.
